misconceptions: A parent-resolved boundary resource can safely leak into an explicit child.
Callback convenience justifies passing execution context as an argument.
Runtime green implies test-source type contracts are green.
optimizations: Use typed rest parameters to bind cleanup dependencies without closures or context transport.
